title: Cipher Mining August 2024 Operational Metrics - Texas Heat Management
text: Production Data: Bitcoin Mined: Approximately 160 BTC (including ~9 BTC equivalent from power sales). Bitcoin Sold: 136 BTC as part of treasury management. Bitcoin Holdings: 2,284 BTC at month-end. Infrastructure Metrics: Deployed Mining Rigs: 76,000 units. Operating Hash Rate: 9.1 EH/s month-end operating hash rate. Notable Operational Context: Company experienced power curtailment during hot Texas summer at Odessa data center. CEO Tyler Page noted team remained active managing operational and electricity pricing risks in Texas heat while advancing construction on Black Pearl facility and completing pending 300 MW site acquisition expected to expand total power capacity beyond 2.5 GW.
